name: Autodesk BIM 360 & Construction Cloud API
what_it_does: Autodesk Platform Services (APS, formerly Forge) and BIM 360/ACC REST API for construction and design collaboration platform. Enables AI agents to manage BIM model file access and version control automation, handle project and issue management workflow automation, access RFI (Request for Information) and submittal tracking data, retrieve quality and safety observation management, manage drawing and document control workflows, handle project analytics and progress tracking data, access model-based quantity and cost data, retrieve clash detection and coordination issue management, manage project member and permission access control, and integrate construction data with ERP, cost management, and field operations platforms.
use_cases: Automating RFI and submittal workflows from construction management agents
Managing BIM model version tracking from design coordination agents
Retrieving safety observation data from safety management agents
Integrating project progress data with ERP from project control agents
not_for: Consumer home improvement without enterprise construction project management
Pure design without construction project management and field operations
Simple file storage without BIM model and construction document management
best_when: A construction or engineering firm using Autodesk BIM 360/ACC wants AI agents to automate RFI/submittal workflows, BIM model management, issue tracking, progress reporting, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated document approval workflows in construction require professional sign-off — automated approval of submittals or RFI responses without engineer review has contractual and safety implications. BIM model version control automation must preserve audit trail for construction contract compliance.

auth.notes: Autodesk Platform Services uses OAuth 2.0 (3-legged and 2-legged). Application credentials for server-to-server; 3-legged for user context. Scope-based access control for data management, BIM 360, and viewer APIs. Python and JavaScript SDKs via APS SDK. Webhooks for model version and issue events. Autodesk Forge deprecated — now APS (Autodesk Platform Services).

pricing.free_tier_limits: APS free tier: 100 cloud credits/mo; BIM 360/ACC requires separate subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: BIM 360/ACC annual subscription per user; APS cloud credits for viewer, model derivative, and reality capture
pricing.notes: San Rafael, California. Autodesk Inc. NASDAQ: ADSK. Founded 1982. $5.5B+ annual revenue. Construction software market leader. BIM 360 rebranded to Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC). AutoCAD, Revit, Civil 3D design tools. 3D model viewer via APS Viewer. Competes with Procore and Bentley for construction management.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; model translation jobs are async; cloud credit consumption for services

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated document approval in construction requires professional review — contractual and safety implications of auto-approving submittals
BIM 360 → ACC migration — Autodesk rebranded BIM 360 to ACC (Autodesk Construction Cloud); some API endpoints migrating; verify current endpoint for your product version
Forge → APS — Autodesk Platform Services (APS) replaced Forge branding; developer.autodesk.com redirects to aps.autodesk.com
Async model translation — BIM model file translation is async via Model Derivative API; implement polling or webhooks for completion
3-legged vs 2-legged OAuth — user context (3-legged) required for project member access; service account (2-legged) for data management
Cloud credit consumption — APS services consume cloud credits; monitor usage in automation to avoid unexpected cost overruns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. BIM model, project, and construction document data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. BIM and construction project data.
